mapper.sql: select id, activity_id, seckill_goods_id, goods_id, goods_type, title, cover, origin_price, seckill_price, total_stock, available_stock, sold_count, limit_per_user, sort, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag from osh_seckill_activity_item where (delete_flag = 0 or delete_flag is null)
mapper.select: and activity_id = #{activityId} order by sort asc, id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into osh_seckill_activity_item (activity_id, seckill_goods_id, goods_id, goods_type, title, cover, origin_price, seckill_price, total_stock, available_stock, sold_count, limit_per_user, sort, create_by, create_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.activityId}, #{item.seckillGoodsId}, #{item.goodsId}, #{item.goodsType}, #{item.title}, #{item.cover}, #{item.originPrice}, #{item.seckillPrice}, #{item.totalStock}, #{item.availableStock}, 0, #{item.limitPerUser}, #{item.sort}, #{item.createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: update osh_seckill_activity_item set delete_flag = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where activity_id = #{activityId} and (delete_flag = 0 or delete_flag is null)

update osh_seckill_activity_item set delete_flag = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id in
#{id}
